shorts.title_distilled: Army Under Secretary Tours Scranton Army Ammunition Plant.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, Pa. — The Under Secretary of the Army, Honorable Michael Obadal, visited the Scranton Army Ammunition Plant on March 19. SCAAP is a government-owned, contractor-operated facility, and is one of 17 arsenals, depots, and ammunition plants that are sub…

shorts.title: Pennsylvania farmers face challenges as temperatures drop
shorts.title_distilled: Pennsylvania farmers face challenges as temperatures drop.
shorts.description: FRANKLIN TOWNSHIP, LUZERNE COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — With chillier temperatures returning to northeastern Pennsylvania, frustration is growing for local farmers trying to protect their crops. Brace's Orchard is just one of many farms feeling the impact. "This is my only source of income, you know, and when the fruit's not there, there's nothing you can do,” [...]
